name: Ink37 - Notification Cleanup
description: Daily cleanup of read (>30d) and unread (>90d) notifications directly via Postgres. No Vercel function invocation needed.

parameters.query: WITH deleted_read AS ( DELETE FROM notification WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM notification WHERE "isRead" = true AND "createdAt" < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY "createdAt" ASC LIMIT 1000 ) ), deleted_unread AS ( DELETE FROM notification WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM notification WHERE "isRead" = false AND "createdAt" < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY "createdAt" ASC LIMIT 1000 ) ) SELECT 'cleanup_complete' AS status;
